case_title: SENG CHEUNG CHING VS. NAN ALEXANDER, INC. C/O JONATHAN NEWMAN, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHING, SENG CHEUNG AS TO DEFENDANT NAN ALEXANDER, INC. C/O JONATHAN NEWMAN, ESQ. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
